stories.title: The Hidden Portal at Central Station

nodes.dialogText: Welcome, traveler! I'm Winnie, and I'm here to tell you about the discovery of Windgap Academy.
It all began at Central Station. Most people rush through without noticing anything unusual, but some special individuals sense something different.
Have you ever felt like there's something magical hiding in plain sight at Central Station?
I knew it! You're one of the special ones who can sense the magic around you.
That's okay! Sometimes magic takes time to reveal itself. But now that you're here, I can show you what others miss.
Between platforms 9 and 10 at Central Station, there's a special brick wall. It looks ordinary to most people.
But if you look at just the right angle, when the morning light hits it perfectly, you might see a shimmer - like ripples on water.
Would you like to try stepping through the wall?
Excellent choice! As you approach the wall, you feel a gentle warmth. Then, instead of hitting solid brick, you step through into a swirl of light!
I understand your hesitation. It does sound strange! But sometimes we need to take a leap of faith to discover something wonderful.
Hi there! I'm Andy. Winnie told me you might need some convincing. I was skeptical too when I first heard about the portal.
But I'm a scientist at heart, and I've studied this phenomenon. The portal operates on principles we're only beginning to understand.
Would you like to see some of my research on the portal? It might help you understand how it works.
Fascinating, isn't it? The portal exists in a space between spaces. Now that you understand the science, are you ready to step through?
Welcome to Windgap Academy! I'm Daisy. The journey through the portal can be disorienting the first time, but you made it!
Our academy exists in a special place - a pocket dimension connected to your world through the portal at Central Station.
Time works differently here. You can spend days learning with us, but when you return, barely a minute will have passed in your world.
Hello! I'm Natalie. We've been expecting you! Each of us at Windgap Academy specializes in different subjects to help you unlock your full potential.
The academy was founded centuries ago by travelers who discovered this pocket dimension and recognized its potential for learning and growth.
And now you're part of our special community! The portal at Central Station appears to those who have the potential to learn and grow with us.
What would you like to explore first at Windgap Academy?
Excellent choice! The technology wing is my domain. We'll explore coding, robotics, and digital creation together. Your journey begins now!
I'm so excited you chose the natural sciences! We'll explore our magical gardens, conduct experiments, and discover the wonders of our environment together!
The arts are my specialty! We'll explore music, visual arts, and creative expression. Your creative journey at Windgap Academy starts right now!
